nodes.name: Dashboard
nodes.plain_english: Home screen showing live weather, AQI, UV, humidity, and a 7-day forecast with an AI summary.

nodes.name: Health Analysis
nodes.plain_english: Screen that checks weather impact on your health — breathing, headache, and fatigue risks with an AI-written summary.

nodes.name: AI Recommendations
nodes.plain_english: Screen with personalized daily tips on what to wear, eat, drink, and do — all based on the weather and your health.

nodes.name: AI Chat
nodes.plain_english: A chatbot where you ask weather and health questions and get answers in Thai, backed by web search.

nodes.name: Weekly Reports
nodes.plain_english: Screen showing weekly health summaries with bar charts, trend lines, and a data table to track changes over time.

nodes.name: City Search
nodes.plain_english: A search bar that looks up any city by name, shows matching results, and switches the whole app to that city.

nodes.name: Weather Data API
nodes.plain_english: Backend that gets real-time weather, forecasts, air quality, and UV data from Open-Meteo and saves it to the database.

nodes.name: Health Analysis Backend
nodes.plain_english: Backend that reads weather data and user health profiles, calculates risks, and generates Thai-language AI health summaries.

nodes.name: Recommendations Backend
nodes.plain_english: Backend that creates personalized activity, clothing, hydration, food menu, and mood suggestions using AI.

nodes.name: Chat Backend
nodes.plain_english: Backend that handles chat — searches the web for current info, asks Typhoon AI to answer in Thai, and saves the conversation.

nodes.name: Reports Backend
nodes.plain_english: Backend that pulls 7 days of health data, computes averages, and generates an AI weekly summary.

nodes.name: Infrastructure
nodes.plain_english: Docker setup, Vercel and Render deployment configs, plus auth middleware, error handling, and text sanitization utilities.

nodes.name: Database
nodes.plain_english: PostgreSQL database with 7 tables — stores users, health profiles, weather records, health analysis results, recommendations, chat history, and weekly reports.

nodes.name: Open-Meteo
nodes.plain_english: Free weather service that provides forecasts, air quality data, UV index, and city name lookups.

nodes.name: Typhoon AI
nodes.plain_english: Thai-language AI model that powers health summaries, personalized recommendations, chat answers, food ideas, and mood insights.

nodes.name: Supabase
nodes.plain_english: Cloud PostgreSQL service that hosts the database, with client libraries used by the backend.

nodes.name: DuckDuckGo
nodes.plain_english: Web search engine that the AI Chat uses to find current information before answering your questions.

summary.headline: A weather-health app that checks real-time conditions, analyzes how they affect your body, gives Thai-language AI advice on what to do, and tracks your weekly health trends — all powered by Open-Meteo, Typhoon AI, and Supabase.
